name: Fruity Nog
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup frozen Florida orange juice concentrate
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender container, combine all ingredients.
2. Cover and blend until the mixture is smooth.
3. Pour into glasses and serve immediately.
4. Alternatively, freeze the mixture in a covered freezer container.
5. Thaw for about 1 hour before serving.
6. Scrape a large spoon across the surface to create a slush.
Makes 4 servings (about 8 ounces each).
Nutrition facts per serving: 208 calories, 7 grams protein, 43 grams carbohydrates, 2 grams total fat (1 gram saturated fat), 6 milligrams cholesterol, 2 grams dietary fiber, 164 milligrams sodium. Daily Value: 147% Vitamin C, 7% Vitamin A, 23% Folate, 14% Thiamin, 17% Riboflavin, 17% Calcium, 22% Potassium.
